title: Jingyao Residence Hall
description: Neighborhood InformationThe Jingyao Residence Halls are located in the Houtan area in Pudong District. text:
Jingyao Residence Hall
Neighborhood Information
The Jingyao Residence Halls are located in the Houtan area in Pudong District. The Residence Halls are a short 10-minute shuttle bus ride away from the New Bund Campus. Shuttle buses, scheduled around the academic schedule will be available during the school year. In addition to the shuttle buses, public transportation is readily available, with metro stations and bus stops connecting students to the greater Shanghai municipal area.
Jump to:
Housing
Resource Center
Common Room
Facilities and Maintenance
Click to zoom
Students living in Jingyao Residence Halls have convenient access to affordable restaurant options in the nearby business malls. The Floor B1 in Shanghai SK Building and International Metropolis Plaza (located about 2 blocks away) both have food courts, offering a wide range of restaurants. Houtan metro station is just 5 stops away (approx. 12 minutes) from Jing’an Temple metro station, which is considered to be one of the major hubs of Shanghai Metro network.
Housing Information
The NYU Shanghai Residence Halls are located in Towers 2, 3 and 5 at Jingyao Apartments. There are five housing options available, including single, double and triple occupancy rooms. All housing units are equipped with the following amenities:
Basic furniture: desk, chair, bed, closet
Private bathroom
Private kitchen* (cooktop, fridge, kettle, and water dispenser included)
Air Conditioner
Washing Machine
Students may choose to purchase bedding for their bed. New bed linens are available at the Tower 5 Resource Center for 350 RMB. Each set includes a quilt, quilt cover, pillow, pillowcase, and bed sheet. Please stop by the T5 Resource Center to purchase a set.
In addition, we also offer a microwave rental service at Jingyao Hall. The microwaves available for rental are 700W, 20L in size, and white in color. Each apartment should rent only one microwave. The rental fee is 50 RMB per semester. Information about reserving a microwave will be shared with residents, via email. Microwaves must be cleaned and returned to the Tower 5 Resource Center before the end of the semester.
Building facilities also include 24/7 security and facility management staff on site. Towers 2 and 3 generally house first-year and sophomore students, while Tower 5 houses mostly upperclass students.
*Students need to purchase their own kitchen supplies and toiletries
Virtual Residence Hall Tour
Use the Virtual Campus Tour tool to navigate through the Jingyao Residence Hall and explore the different room types, common rooms and the Resource Center.
Click Here to Take a Virtual Tour of Jingyao Residence Hall
Housing Gallery
Jingyao Residence Hall Housing Rates
Housing Application General Timeline
Incoming first-year students will receive more information on housing applications in early August.For more information on housing, please email shanghai.reslife@nyu.edu.
Room Damages and Utilities Policy
Resource Center (RC)
Location: Tower 5 Lobby (inside Winter Common Room)Hours of operation: 9 am-9 pm*Summer/Winter Break operation hours: 9 am-6 pm
The RC acts as the hub of the NYU Shanghai residential community at Jingyao residence halls, helping students navigate university resources and services and keeping residents connected and informed. Students are welcome to visit the RC with questions about NYU Shanghai, the residence hall, or any general inquiries they may have while staying with us.
Services provided by the RC includes but are not limited to on-campus events, cleaning supply rental and bedding/linen purchases. For more information about the Resource Center, please email shanghai.rc@nyu.edu.
Package Services: The Resource Center does not provide package services. To receive packages at Jingyao Residence Halls, please use smart lockers located in front of Tower 3 and/or community mailroom (菜鸟) located between Tower 2 and Tower 3.
Click here for more information on international packages and package room instructions.
Mailing Address:
(English) Room XXXX, Tower X, No. 533 Jiming Road, Pudong New District, Shanghai, China, 200126 (Chinese) 上海市 浦东新区 济明路533弄 X号楼 XXXX 【200126】
Common Room
On-campus residents will have access to the four common rooms (Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter) located in the lobby of Tower 5. In addition to the many common spaces in the NYU Shanghai campus building, each of the common rooms in Jingyao residence halls provides space and resources suitable for study, meeting and leisure purposes.
Spring: iMac lab, printer, communal microwaves, multi-purpose space
Summer: Multi-purpose space
Autumn: Multi-purpose space
Winter: Resource Center, printer, multi-purpose space, bathroom
Resource Center and Common Room Gallery
Facilities and Maintenance
Non-urgent issues: Scan this QR Code (right) to file a work order on NYU Shanghai WeChat Platform.
Urgent issues (Mon-Fri 9 am - 5 pm): Call Facilities Management Team at 021-2059-5866
Urgent issues (non-business hours): Go to the Tower 2 Campus Safety booth to speak with the Campus Safety Officer on duty
